name: BILI Social International, Inc.
business: The company, through its subsidiary BILI, operates an AI-driven social commerce platform that connects social media creators with brands. It offers services including creator-driven product sales (BILI Base), creator marketing campaigns with guaranteed results (BILI Boost), and AI-enabled automated content creation. Its target customers include enterprise brands, small and medium businesses, and content creators.

exposures.sentence: BILI, BecauseILoveIt.com, is an emerging AI powered social commerce platform that empowers individuals to monetize their social media content by connecting creators with brands, enabling them to create personalized online stores and participate in brand campaigns by leveraging their social media presence.

The current presidential administration recently released its AI Action Plan, prioritizing building the country's AI capabilities, including data centers and other support, while removing certain regulatory barriers.
We aim to expand these partnerships to other sports including but not limited to basketball, soccer, baseball and the lucrative and expanding eSports segments.

tamClaims.claim: There are an estimated 10+ million creators in North America.
tamClaims.sentence: There are an estimated 10+ million creators in North America, (and many more worldwide) and we believe we have data on every one of them.
